zh.lifeSummary: 當Jone Millard於1550年4月8日出生在英國薩默塞特巴斯時，她的父親John Millard35歲，母親Isabella Zouche18歲。她於1569年10月22日與William Cullen III在英國薩默塞特巴斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1592年1月在她的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jone Millard于1550年4月8日出生在英国薩默塞特巴斯时，她的父亲John Millard35岁，母亲Isabella Zouche18岁。她于1569年10月22日与William Cullen III在英国薩默塞特巴斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1592年1月在她的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Millard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements mil ‘good, gracious’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. Compare Milord .
French (southern): from a variant of Occitan milhar ‘millet field’, a derivative of mil ‘millet’.

variants.name: Milliard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Guillaume, Treffle.
English (southern, especially Bedfordshire): variant of   Millward  .

variants.name: Millward
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): occupational name from Middle English milne-ward, mille-ward ‘keeper of a mill, miller’ (Old English mylen-weard). In southern England and the West Midlands this was a standard medieval term for a miller. Compare Miller .

variants.name: Milord
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Herve, Marie Carmel, Veronique.  Spanish Berta, Lorenza, Narciso, Tulia.

French and Haitian: nickname for an important or rich man, from milord, a borrowing of English my lord. Or, in Haiti, from the personal name Milord of the same origin. This surname was brought to the US mostly from Haiti, where it is by far most common.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Jone Millard was born on 8 April 1550, in Bath, Somerset, England, her father, John Millard, was 35 and her mother, Isabella Zouche, was 18. She married William Cullen III on 22 October 1569, in Bath, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died in January 1592, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jone Millard est née le 8 avril 1550, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Millard, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabella Zouche, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William Cullen III le 22 octobre 1569, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1592, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

Lei sposato William Cullen III il 22 ottobre 1569, nel Bath, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1592, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jone Millardが1550年4月8日にイギリスソメルセトバスで生まれた時，父John Millardは35歳，母Isabella Zoucheは18歳であった。1569年10月22日にイギリスソメルセトバスでWilliam Cullen IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1592年1月に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jone Millard(이)가 1550년 4월 8일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Millard(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Zouche(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1569년 10월 22일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 William Cullen III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1592년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jone Millard nasceu em 8 de abril de 1550, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Millard, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Zouche, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cullen III em 22 de outubro de 1569, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1592, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jone Millard родилась 8 апреля 1550 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Millard было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Zouche, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cullen III 22 октября 1569 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла январь 1592 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год.
